---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Orchard
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear description of the problem or friction you're hitting. E.g. "I'm always
frustrated when …"

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Orchard to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to how the `container` CLI handles this, or anything
else that helps.
